title: Milestone-Scoped Report Generation
purpose: Extend pm-report.js with --milestone flag to generate focused, readable reports for a single milestone including ticket breakdown, progress metrics, deliverables status, and dependency health.
architectural_constraints: Must resolve milestones via registry (not hardcoded paths)
Must support --json and default Markdown output
Must include ticket deliverables status check

deliverables.description: Extended with --milestone flag and focused report output

acceptance_criteria: pm-report.js --milestone M11 produces focused milestone report
Report includes: milestone metadata, ticket list with status, deliverables status, dependency health, hours summary

traceability.description: Extended pm-report.js with --milestone flag for focused milestone reports
